name: python3-gattlib
title: python3-gattlib
summary: Bluetooth LE GATT library for Python 3
description:
Bluetooth LE GATT library for Python 3
This is a Python library to use the GATT Protocol for Bluetooth LE
devices. It is a wrapper around the implementation used by gatttool
in bluez package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-gattlib because Bluetooth LE GATT library for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-gattlib as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-gattlib with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-gattlib --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
